traits.name: Spare Heart
traits.text: Dominant. The first time one of your Traits would be destroyed, block it instead; then this is destroyed.
traits.designNotes: Anchor organ. Dominant so it can't be pre-removed cheaply.

traits.name: Backup Kidney
traits.text: When an Age Stabilizes, if you have 0 cards in hand, draw 1.
traits.designNotes: Rewards dumping your hand; small engine.

traits.name: Elastic Stomach
traits.text: Your hand size limit is +3. End: +1 for every 3 cards in hand.

traits.name: Redundant Lung
traits.text: Dominant.
traits.designNotes: Plain Dominant body block; low tempo, safe points.

traits.name: Overclocked Spleen
traits.text: Immediate: draw 2, then discard 1.

traits.name: Gastric Furnace
traits.text: Immediate: discard 1 to draw 2.

traits.name: Blubber Reserve
traits.text: Survives cold or freezing Ages.

traits.name: Chitin Plating
traits.text: Dominant. Immune to poison.

traits.name: Regrowth Node
traits.text: Late. Immediate: revive one of your own destroyed Traits from the discard pile.

traits.name: Ossified Skull
traits.text: Dominant.

traits.name: Bioluminescent Liver
traits.text: Passive: your hand is protected from reveal effects.

traits.name: Vestigial Tail
traits.text: End: +2 if this is at the far left or far right of your Gene Pool.

traits.name: Prehensile Gut
traits.text: Immediate: play an extra Body Trait this turn.

traits.name: Fat Storage Sac
traits.text: End: +1 for each card in your discard pile you own, max +4.

traits.name: Nictitating Membrane
traits.text: Dominant. Passive: opponents cannot see this Trait's text until Stabilize.

traits.name: Corrosion-Proof Skin
traits.text: Dominant. Cannot be destroyed by discard/acid effects.

traits.name: Tardigrade Mode
traits.text: Dominant. Survives every Age wipe. End: +3 if you survived a wipe.
traits.designNotes: Negative base, huge if apocalypse hits.

traits.name: Antifreeze Blood
traits.text: Survives freezing Ages. Immediate: draw 1.

traits.name: Extra Ribcage
traits.text: Passive: the second time a Trait of yours would be destroyed, block it.

traits.name: Marrow Vault
traits.text: End: +1 for every 2 Body Traits you control.

traits.name: Runaway Growth
traits.text: End: +1 for each OTHER Body Trait you control.

traits.name: Gene Boom
traits.text: Immediate: draw 1. High points, no defense.

traits.name: Callus Armor
traits.text: Dominant.
traits.designNotes: Filler Dominant, keeps Dominant count healthy.

traits.name: Third Eyelid
traits.text: Passive: you may look at the top card of the draw pile before your turn.

traits.name: Molting Coat
traits.text: Immediate: destroy one of your own Traits, then draw 2.

traits.name: Sasquatch Physique
traits.text: Highest-point Body Trait. Cannot use its own effect.
traits.designNotes: Beacon for theft; balances high raw points.

traits.name: Ambush Fangs
traits.text: Immediate: destroy the lowest-point non-Dominant Trait of the opponent with the most Gene Pool points.

traits.name: Kleptomandible
traits.text: Immediate: steal a random card from the hand of the opponent with the most cards.

traits.name: Sticky Tongue
traits.text: Immediate: steal a chosen non-Dominant Trait from a public Gene Pool.
traits.designNotes: Premium theft; needs choice UI, has auto fallback.

traits.name: Neurotoxin Sac
traits.text: Immediate: poison a non-Dominant Trait; it is destroyed at the next Stabilize.

traits.name: Delayed Venom
traits.text: Immediate: poison the highest-point non-Dominant Trait in play. It dies in TWO Stabilizes.

traits.name: Pickpocket Palps
traits.text: Immediate: steal 1 random card from the next opponent's hand.

traits.name: Bone Saw Claw
traits.text: Immediate: destroy the most recently played non-Dominant Trait in play.
traits.designNotes: Punishes the last combo piece played.

traits.name: Acid Spit
traits.text: Immediate: destroy a random non-Dominant Trait and send it to its owner's discard.
traits.designNotes: Fuels opponents' discard decks — costed at 0.

traits.name: Heartbreaker
traits.text: Immediate: destroy a target's Spare Heart or Extra Ribcage if it has one; otherwise destroy its most recent non-Dominant Trait.
traits.designNotes: Requested 'girl breaks his heart' card; strips defensive organs first.

traits.name: Death Roll
traits.text: Immediate: destroy the highest-point non-Dominant Trait of the opponent with the most points.

traits.name: Cannibal Reflex
traits.text: Immediate: destroy one of your own Traits; steal a random Trait from any opponent.

traits.name: Territorial Roar
traits.text: Immediate: every opponent discards 1 random card from hand.

traits.name: Marrow Thief
traits.text: Immediate: steal the most recent card from the largest discard pile.

traits.name: Gene Splicer
traits.text: Immediate: steal a random Trait, then copy its immediate effect.
traits.designNotes: RISKY — steal + copy tempo swing. Watch in balance pass.

traits.name: Apex Ambusher
traits.text: Immediate: skip the next player's turn.
traits.designNotes: Tempo denial with solid body points.

traits.name: Toxic Molt
traits.text: When this is destroyed, poison a random opponent Trait.

traits.name: Beak Full of Debt
traits.text: End: the opponent with the most points scores -2. You score +1.

traits.name: Gene Pool Drain
traits.text: Immediate: destroy the two lowest-point non-Dominant Traits of the point leader.
traits.designNotes: Requested 'decrease gene pool' card; heavy tempo, 0 pts.

traits.name: Poison Dart Skin
traits.text: Dominant. When an opponent destroys any of your Traits, poison a random Trait of theirs.
traits.designNotes: Dominant deterrent, low point efficiency by design.

traits.name: Backstab Stinger
traits.text: Late. Immediate: destroy one non-Dominant Trait played this Age.
traits.designNotes: Answers combos assembled during the Age.

traits.name: Rot Touch
traits.text: Immediate: destroy the single lowest-point Trait in the whole game.
traits.designNotes: Cheap removal, cannot hit fat targets.

traits.name: Fang Tax
traits.text: Immediate: each opponent gives you 1 card or discards 2 (server auto-picks the worse for them).

traits.name: Culling Instinct
traits.text: Immediate: if any opponent has more Traits than you, destroy one of their non-Dominant Traits.

traits.name: Constrictor Coil
traits.text: Immediate: the next opponent skips their draw next turn.

traits.name: Hive Mind
traits.text: End: +1 for each other Social Trait you control.

traits.name: Larval Cloud
traits.text: Immediate: draw 1 for every 2 Social Traits you already control (max 3).

traits.name: Bite Choir
traits.text: Immediate: if you control 3+ Social Traits, every opponent discards 1.

traits.name: Locust Bloom
traits.text: End: +1 per Social Trait across ALL Gene Pools, max +5.
traits.designNotes: Rewards a swarmy table, not just you.

traits.name: Mimic Octopus
traits.text: Immediate: copy the immediate effect of any Trait already in play.

traits.name: Cuckoo Egg
traits.text: Parasite. Place into an opponent's Gene Pool. Its owner scores it as -2.
traits.designNotes: Cheap curse; you play it, they suffer.

traits.name: Peer Pressure
traits.text: Immediate: the next opponent must discard their highest-point card in hand (server picks).
traits.designNotes: Targeted hand attack, no UI needed.

traits.name: Symbiote Handshake
traits.text: Immediate: you and the opponent with the fewest points each draw 1.
traits.designNotes: Politics card; softens threat while you build.

traits.name: Pheromone Trail
traits.text: Immediate: reverse turn order.
traits.designNotes: Cheap order control for Late/skip setups.

traits.name: Waggle Dance
traits.text: Immediate: choose who takes the next turn (default: player with fewest Traits).

traits.name: Chameleon Coat
traits.text: Passive: this counts as the color of the Trait to its immediate left.

traits.name: Angry Professor
traits.text: Immediate: every opponent discards 1 random card. 'Revise and resubmit.'

traits.name: Asian Parent
traits.text: End: if you have the MOST Gene Pool points, +5. If not, -2. 'Why not 100%?'
traits.designNotes: Requested card. Swingy but capped; rewards committing to the lead.

traits.name: Group Project
traits.text: Immediate: swap 1 random card with the opponent who has the most cards. 'Someone did no work.'

traits.name: Gossip Web
traits.text: Immediate: reveal the full hand (with card text) of the point leader to everyone.

traits.name: Snitch
traits.text: Immediate: reveal an opponent's hand, then steal 1 named card from it.
traits.designNotes: Info into theft; auto-picks best if no choice.

traits.name: Tiny Violin
traits.text: Passive: whenever an opponent loses a Trait, draw 1. 'So sad.'

traits.name: Conga Line
traits.text: Immediate: reverse turn order AND skip the new next player.

traits.name: Rumor Mill
traits.text: Parasite. Place on an opponent. While placed, its host cannot use immediate effects.
traits.designNotes: Shuts down a combo engine, not just points.

traits.name: Nepotism
traits.text: Immediate: if the Trait to your left shares this color, play an extra Trait.

traits.name: Groupthink
traits.text: Immediate: copy the immediate effect of the last Trait played by any player this turn.
traits.designNotes: Reactive copy; needs a target to exist.

traits.name: Molt Party
traits.text: Immediate: every player (including you) discards 1, then draws 1.

traits.name: Cuckoo Chorus
traits.text: Parasite. Host scores -1; you score +1 for each parasite you've placed.

traits.name: Flash Mob
traits.text: Immediate: play an extra Social Trait this turn.

traits.name: Junk DNA
traits.text: End: +1 for each other Weird Trait you control.

traits.name: Retrovirus
traits.text: Immediate: play a Trait from any discard pile as if it were yours.

traits.name: Horizontal Gene Transfer
traits.text: Immediate: copy any non-Dominant Trait in play into your Gene Pool (a token copy, 0 points).
traits.designNotes: RISKY copy — token has no points but keeps effects.

traits.name: Frameshift
traits.text: Immediate: reverse turn order.
traits.designNotes: Second copy of order control in Weird.

traits.name: Point Mutation
traits.text: Immediate: change the color of any one Trait in play (yours or theirs).

traits.name: Chaos Codon
traits.text: Immediate: trigger a random supported effect (server RNG).
traits.designNotes: High variance; flagged in balance pass.

traits.name: Time Loop
traits.text: Immediate: play one extra Trait this turn.

traits.name: Necrotic Bloom
traits.text: End: +1 for every 2 cards in your discard pile, max +5.

traits.name: Grave Robber
traits.text: Immediate: revive any Trait from any discard pile into your Gene Pool.

traits.name: Second Draft
traits.text: Late. Immediate: return one of your Traits from the discard to your hand.

traits.name: Paradox Egg
traits.text: Late. When played, immediately take another turn.
traits.designNotes: Duplicate egg emoji flagged; strong Late tempo, negative pts.

traits.name: Butterfly Effect
traits.text: Immediate: reverse turn order and every player passes 1 random card left.

traits.name: Schrodinger's Cell
traits.text: End: flip a server coin — this is worth 5 or -1.

traits.name: Mutagen Bath
traits.text: Immediate: every non-Dominant Trait in play becomes Weird until end of game.

traits.name: Rewind Enzyme
traits.text: Immediate: return the most recently played non-Dominant Trait to its owner's hand.

traits.name: Fossil Record
traits.text: End: +1 for each unique color present in your discard pile.

traits.name: Doppelganger
traits.text: Immediate: copy the passive effect of an opponent's Trait for the rest of the game.

traits.name: Prion Cascade
traits.text: Parasite. Host scores -2. When host destroys a Trait, this spreads a copy to another player.
traits.designNotes: Curse that multiplies; strong at aggro tables.

traits.name: Entropy Well
traits.text: Immediate: every player destroys their own lowest-point non-Dominant Trait.

traits.name: Quantum Molt
traits.text: Late. Immediate: play an extra Trait this turn.
traits.designNotes: Duplicate spiral emoji flagged; Late tempo.

traits.name: Recursive Larva
traits.text: Immediate: if you played a Trait earlier this turn, play another.
traits.designNotes: Chain payoff; needs a prior play.

traits.name: Deja Vu
traits.text: Immediate: copy the effect of the current Age.
traits.designNotes: Age synergy; variance follows the Age.

traits.name: Null Allele
traits.text: Dominant. Cannot be destroyed, stolen, or swapped. End: +6.
traits.designNotes: Duplicate hole emoji flagged; net +3 locked points, no board impact.

traits.name: Glitch in the Germline
traits.text: Immediate: copy the immediate effect of the last Trait YOU played.

traits.name: Chow Mein
traits.text: Passive: if adjacent to Orange Chicken, both score +3 at end (Combo Meal).

traits.name: Orange Chicken
traits.text: Passive: if adjacent to Chow Mein, both score +3 at end (Combo Meal).
traits.designNotes: Requested card; adjacency combo half #2. Cross-color pairing.

traits.name: Kimchi Fried Rice
traits.text: Passive: +1 for each food Trait adjacent to it. Immune to poison (fermented).
traits.designNotes: Third food piece; deepens the combo family, anti-poison flavor.

traits.name: Boba
traits.text: Immediate: draw 1. Passive: counts as a food Trait for Combo Meal.

traits.name: Spicy Ramen Challenge
traits.text: Immediate: poison your own lowest Trait; if you survive to Stabilize, draw 3.

traits.name: Contrarian Gene
traits.text: End: +5 if you have the FEWEST Gene Pool points (excluding this).

traits.name: Rainbow Chromosome
traits.text: End: +2 for each of the 4 colors present in your Gene Pool.
traits.designNotes: Rewards balanced 4-color boards; caps at +8 raw but points band respected via base 2.

traits.name: Sleeper Cell
traits.text: Late. Immediate: steal a random Trait from the point leader.

traits.name: Living Fossil
traits.text: Dominant. Cannot be copied.

traits.name: Immortal Jellyfish
traits.text: Dominant. When destroyed by an Age, return to your hand instead.

traits.name: Tapeworm
traits.text: Parasite. Host draws 1 fewer card each turn.
traits.designNotes: Attacks the engine, not the score.

traits.name: Zombie Ant Fungus
traits.text: Parasite. Late. Place on the point leader; you control their next turn's single play.
traits.designNotes: Splashy Late parasite; strong but one-shot and negative pts.

traits.name: Emotional Support Slime
traits.text: Dominant.
traits.designNotes: Filler Dominant to keep count; safe points.

traits.name: Panic Spore
traits.text: Late. Immediate: every opponent discards their highest-point card in hand.

traits.name: Detritivore
traits.text: Immediate: play a Trait from your own discard pile.

traits.name: Necromancer Cell
traits.text: Immediate: revive an opponent's discarded Trait into your Gene Pool.

traits.name: Bone Orchard
traits.text: End: +1 for each different card NAME in your discard pile, max 4.

traits.name: Regurgitation
traits.text: Immediate: return your most recent discard to hand, then draw 1.

traits.name: Scab Harvest
traits.text: Immediate: play the top card of the largest discard pile as your own.

traits.name: Carrion Beetle
traits.text: End: +1 for every 2 cards across ALL discard piles, max 5.
traits.designNotes: Global discard payoff; loves grindy games.

traits.name: Deathbed Mutation
traits.text: Late. Immediate: revive your most recently destroyed Trait.

traits.name: Botfly Larva
traits.text: Parasite. At each Stabilize, the host discards 1 random card.

traits.name: Bloodsucker
traits.text: Parasite. Whenever the host draws a card, you draw 1.

traits.name: Mind-Control Vine
traits.text: Parasite. At each Stabilize, the host gives you their highest-point card in hand.
traits.designNotes: Recurring card theft; strong, negative pts.

traits.name: Cursed Gene
traits.text: Parasite. The host's endgame scoring bonuses are halved.
traits.designNotes: Anti-combo curse; hits scoring decks hardest.

traits.name: Ichneumon Wasp
traits.text: Parasite. Late. While placed, the host cannot play Late cards.

traits.name: Last Word
traits.text: Late. Immediate: copy the immediate effect of the last Trait played this Age.

traits.name: Nocturnal Strike
traits.text: Late. Immediate: destroy a non-Dominant Trait played this Age.
traits.designNotes: Answers combos assembled during the Age.

ages.name: The Warm Shallows
ages.text: Everyone draws 2. A gentle beginning.

ages.name: Great Oxygenation
ages.text: Every player with 2+ Body Traits draws 1; others discard 1.

ages.name: Predator Boom
ages.text: Each player may destroy one non-Dominant Trait of the point leader (auto: lowest).

ages.name: Toxic Bloom
ages.text: All non-Dominant Traits at the edges of each Gene Pool are poisoned.

ages.name: Ice Age
ages.text: Every non-Dominant Trait worth 3+ points is destroyed unless its owner discards 2.

ages.name: Gene Rush
ages.text: Everyone draws up to a full hand of 6.

ages.name: Migration
ages.text: Reverse turn order for the rest of the game.

ages.name: Symbiosis Era
ages.text: Each player passes their whole hand to the next player.

ages.name: Plague Years
ages.text: Every player poisons a random non-Dominant Trait of the player on their left.

ages.name: Mutation Storm
ages.text: Every non-Dominant Trait's color is randomized.

ages.name: Scavenger Feast
ages.text: Each player may play 1 Trait from their own discard pile for free.

ages.name: Territorial War
ages.text: Each player destroys the most recent Trait of the opponent to their right.

ages.name: Population Bottleneck
ages.text: Every player keeps only their 3 highest-point Traits; the rest are discarded.
ages.designNotes: Brutal midgame reset; Dominant still bound by 'highest' rule.

ages.name: Open Ecosystem
ages.text: Reveal every player's hand with full card text until the next Age.

ages.name: Cambrian Explosion
ages.text: Each player immediately plays one extra Trait.

ages.name: Parasite Wave
ages.text: Each player places their cheapest Parasite (if any) on the point leader.

ages.name: The Long Drought
ages.text: No one may draw next turn.

ages.name: Convergent Evolution
ages.text: Each player scores +2 now-locked points if all their Traits share 2 or fewer colors.

ages.name: Radiation Belt
ages.text: Each player discards 2, then draws 1; poison spreads to a random Trait each.

ages.name: The Great Dying
ages.text: FINAL AGE. Every non-Dominant Trait worth 4+ points is destroyed. Then score.
ages.designNotes: Apocalypse finisher; makes Dominant and low-point payoffs shine.

ages.name: Heat Death
ages.text: FINAL AGE. All Parasites resolve, all poison resolves, then score.
